name: Scheduled Task Created on a Compromised Host
notes: This rule triggers when a scheduled task has been created on a compromised host.
bb_references: BB: A Scheduled Task Has Been Created
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when an event matches any of the following BB: A Scheduled Task Has Been Created
when any of Source IP are contained in any of Compromised Hosts - IP
TD_list: APPLY Scheduled Task Created on a Compromised Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when an event matches any of the following BB: A Scheduled Task Has Been Created
AND when any of Source IP are contained in any of Compromised Hosts - IP
RED_list: Event name: A Scheduled Task Has Been Created in a Compromised Host
Event description: A Scheduled Task Has Been Created in a Compromised Host
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
